title: Leave Letter to Professor
template: Write a formal leave letter from {{name}}, a {{year}} year student of {{department}} at {{college}}, requesting leave from [start date] to [end date] due to [reason]. Keep it respectful and concise.
preview: Write a formal leave letter from a student requesting absence from class...

title: Assignment Extension Request
template: Draft a polite email from {{name}}, studying {{department}} at {{college}}, to a professor requesting a deadline extension for [assignment name] originally due on [original date]. Mention the reason briefly and propose a new date.
preview: Draft a polite email requesting a deadline extension for an assignment...

title: Permission Letter for Event
template: Write a permission letter for {{name}} from {{department}}, {{year}} year at {{college}}, to participate in [event name] happening on [date] at [location]. Include parent/guardian consent if needed.
preview: Write a permission letter to participate in a college event...

title: AI Tutoring Request
template: Act as a patient tutor helping {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student. Explain [concept/topic] step-by-step using simple language, real examples, and check for understanding at each step.
preview: Act as a patient tutor and explain a concept step-by-step...

title: Personalized Study Plan
template: Create a detailed study plan for {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student at {{college}}, to prepare for [exam/subject] in [number] days. Include daily topics, break times, revision slots, and tips for retention.
preview: Create a detailed study plan to prepare for an upcoming exam...

title: Explain Like I'm Five (ELI5)
template: Explain [complex topic] to me like I'm five years old. Use an analogy from everyday life that a student like {{name}} studying {{department}} would relate to.
preview: Explain a complex topic using simple everyday analogies...

title: Research Topic Generator
template: Suggest 10 unique and impactful research topics for a {{year}} year {{department}} student at {{college}}. For each topic, include a brief description, why it matters today, and potential data sources.
preview: Suggest unique and impactful research topics for your department...

title: Academic Text Summarizer
template:
Summarize the following text into key bullet points for {{name}}, a {{department}} student. Keep the summary under 200 words, highlight main arguments, and list 3 key takeaways.

[Paste your text here]
preview: Summarize academic text into concise bullet points and key takeaways...

title: Resume Builder from Scratch
template: Create a professional resume for {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student at {{college}}. Include sections for Education, Skills, Projects, Certifications, and Extracurriculars. Tailor it for a [target role] position.
preview: Create a professional resume tailored for a specific target role...

title: Resume Improvement Feedback
template:
Review this resume for {{name}} and provide specific improvement suggestions. Focus on ATS optimization, action verbs, quantifiable achievements, and formatting. Point out weaknesses and rewrite 3 bullet points as examples.

[Paste resume here]
preview: Review and improve a resume with ATS optimization and action verbs...

title: Interview Preparation Coach
template: Act as an interview coach for {{name}}, a {{department}} student applying for [role] at [company]. Generate 10 likely interview questions (mix of technical, behavioral, and situational), and suggest ideal answer frameworks for each.
preview: Act as an interview coach and generate likely interview questions...

title: Internship Application Email
template: Write a compelling internship application email from {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student at {{college}}, applying for [internship role] at [company name]. Highlight relevant skills and express enthusiasm professionally.
preview: Write a compelling internship application email to a company...

title: Job Application Cover Letter
template: Write a professional job application cover letter for {{name}} from {{department}} at {{college}} applying for [job title] at [company]. Include why they're a strong fit, 2-3 key strengths, and a confident closing.
preview: Write a professional job application cover letter for a specific role...

title: Follow-up Email After Interview
template: Write a professional follow-up email from {{name}} to [interviewer name] at [company] after an interview for [role]. Express gratitude, reinforce interest, mention one memorable topic from the interview, and ask about next steps.
preview: Write a professional follow-up thank-you email after an interview...

title: HR Recruitment Email
template: Write a professional HR recruitment email to reach out to a potential candidate for [job role] at [company]. Include the role overview, why the company is a great place to work, and a clear call to action.
preview: Write an HR recruitment outreach email to attract top candidates...

title: Performance Review Summary
template: Write a balanced performance review summary for an employee in [department] who has shown [strengths] but needs improvement in [areas]. Use a professional, constructive tone. Include a development plan.
preview: Write a balanced performance review with strengths and development plan...

title: Cold Email to Professor for Research
template: Write a cold email from {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student at {{college}}, to Professor [Name] expressing interest in joining their research group on [research area]. Keep it under 200 words, specific, and professional.
preview: Write a cold email to a professor expressing interest in their research...

title: Scholarship Application Essay
template: Write a compelling scholarship application essay for {{name}}, studying {{department}} at {{college}}. The scholarship is for [scholarship name]. Focus on academic achievements, financial need, and future goals. Word limit: [X] words.
preview: Write a compelling scholarship application essay highlighting achievements...

title: Group Project Role Assignment Email
template: Draft an email from {{name}}, a {{department}} student, to group members assigning roles for [project name]. Include each person's responsibility, deadlines, and a meeting schedule. Keep it friendly yet organized.
preview: Draft an email assigning roles and responsibilities for a group project...

title: LinkedIn Profile Summary
template: Write a compelling LinkedIn summary for {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student at {{college}} interested in [career field]. Make it conversational, highlight top skills and projects, and end with what they're looking for.
preview: Write a compelling LinkedIn profile summary for career building...

title: Internship Experience Description
template: Convert this internship experience into 4 powerful resume bullet points for {{name}} from {{department}}: [Describe what you did during internship at company]. Use action verbs and quantify impact where possible.
preview: Convert internship experience into powerful resume bullet points...

title: Exam Stress Management Tips
template: Give {{name}}, a {{year}} year {{department}} student, 10 practical and evidence-based tips to manage exam stress. Include study breaks, sleep hygiene, focus techniques, and mindset shifts.
preview: Get practical evidence-based tips to manage exam stress effectively...

title: Offer Letter Acceptance Email
template: Write a professional email from {{name}} to [HR contact] at [company] accepting the job offer for [position]. Express enthusiasm, confirm start date, and ask any necessary questions about onboarding.
preview: Write a professional email accepting a job offer with enthusiasm...

title: HR Policy FAQ Generator
template: Generate a clear and friendly FAQ section for [HR policy topic, e.g., remote work policy] at [company name]. Include 8 common employee questions with concise, accurate answers.
preview: Generate a clear HR policy FAQ for employee handbook documentation...

title: Concept Mind Map Prompt
template: Create a text-based mind map for {{name}} studying {{department}} to understand [topic]. Use indentation to show relationships between main ideas, sub-concepts, and examples. Make it exam-ready.
preview: Create a text-based mind map to visually organize complex concepts...
